pages.text: Mixing Philosopher's Stone with panacea, adding eggs and ice cubes, then tossing in a roadside berry yields... a sundae consumable only by certain lame undead creatures? Edible solely by Liches.$(br)Grants consumer:$(br)$(li)Permanent Eternity II & Soul Armor II$(li)30-minute Midas Touch$(li)Permanently increases magic resistance by 50% (single activation)$(li)+10% mining speed for all breakable blocks (three activations max)
